mapper.sql: select id, audit_point, audit_prospective_point, audit_system_name, audit_system_content, audit_confirmation_findings, audit_model_name_send, audit_model_logic, audit_model_number, create_person, create_time, update_person, update_time, isdel from audit_elements_handover_model

select.where:
and id = like CONCAT('%', #{id}, '%') and audit_point like '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{auditPoint}, '%') || '%' and audit_prospective_point like '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{auditProspectivePoint}, '%') || '%'
and audit_system_name = like CONCAT('%', #{auditSystemName}, '%')
and audit_system_content like '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{auditSystemContent}, '%') || '%'
and audit_confirmation_findings = like CONCAT('%', #{auditConfirmationFindings}, '%')
and audit_model_name_send = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNameSend}, '%') and audit_model_logic = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelLogic}, '%') and audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') and create_person = like CONCAT('%', #{createPerson}, '%') and create_time = like CONCAT('%', #{createTime}, '%') and update_person = like CONCAT('%', #{updatePerson}, '%') and update_time = like CONCAT('%', #{updateTime}, '%') and isdel =1

mapper.insert:
insert into audit_elements_handover_model
audit_point, audit_prospective_point, audit_system_name, audit_system_content, audit_confirmation_findings, audit_model_name_send, audit_model_logic, audit_model_number, create_person,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as create_time, update_person,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as update_time, isdel,
like CONCAT('%', #{auditPoint}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditProspectivePoint}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditSystemName}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditSystemContent}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditConfirmationFindings}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNameSend}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelLogic}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{createPerson}, '%'), NOW(), like CONCAT('%', #{updatePerson}, '%'), NOW(), like CONCAT('%', #{isdel}, '%'),
mapper.update:
UPDATE audit_elements_handover_model
audit_point=like CONCAT('%', #{auditPoint}, '%'),
audit_prospective_point=like CONCAT('%', #{auditProspectivePoint}, '%'),
audit_system_name=like CONCAT('%', #{auditSystemName}, '%'),
audit_system_content=like CONCAT('%', #{auditSystemContent}, '%'),
audit_confirmation_findings=like CONCAT('%', #{auditConfirmationFindings}, '%'), audit_model_name_send=like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNameSend}, '%'), audit_model_logic=like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelLogic}, '%'), audit_model_number=like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), create_person=like CONCAT('%', #{createPerson}, '%'), create_time=like CONCAT('%', #{createTime}, '%'), update_person, update_time=like CONCAT('%', #{updateTime}, '%'), isdel=like CONCAT('%', #{isdel}, '%'),
where audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
UPDATE audit_elements_handover_model SET isdel=0 where audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.select: select * from audit_elements_handover_model where audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND isdel = 1;

WITH filtered_steps AS ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, type_of_information, detailed_time, write_time FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE delete_status = '1' AND information_type = '审计模型来源信息'
AND "is_import" = like CONCAT('%', #{isImport}, '%')
AND dock_people = like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%')
AND dock_department LIKE like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
), filtered_info AS ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, information_sources, audit_point_number, remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, is_online, share_unit, second_model_number FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
AND offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process LIKE '%'||like CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%'), '%')
AND secondary_business_process LIKE '%'||like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%'), '%')
AND information_sources = like CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%')
AND audit_point_number LIKE '%'||like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%'), '%')
AND audit_point_name LIKE '%'||like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%'), '%')
AND audit_model_number LIKE '%'||like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), '%')
AND audit_model_name LIKE '%'||like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%'), '%')
), org_info AS ( SELECT DISTINCT "busiUnitCode" || "orgCode" AS "id", "provinceName" || '-' || "orgName" AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" = 'CM000' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT "busiUnitCode" AS "id", "provinceName" AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" != 'CM000' ) SELECT a.auditPointNumber, a.auditPointName, a.auditModelNumber, a.auditModelName, a.dockPeople, a.dockDepartment, a.primaryBusinessProcess, a.secondaryBusinessProcess, a.informationSources, a.isOnline, a.remark, a.typeOfInformation, a.detailedTime, a.write_time, c."name" AS shareUnitName, a.second_model_number, b."ModelName" AS secondModelName FROM ( SELECT b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.information_sources AS informationSources, b.is_online AS isOnline, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark, a.type_of_information AS typeOfInformation, a.detailed_time AS detailedTime, a.write_time, b.share_unit AS share_unit, b.second_model_number FROM filtered_steps a JOIN filtered_info b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ORDER BY a.detailed_time DESC LIMIT like CONCAT('%', #{size}, '%') OFFSET like CONCAT('%', #{page}, '%') ) a LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."xbpj_company_model" b ON a.second_model_number = b."ModelNo" LEFT JOIN org_info c ON a.share_unit = c."id" ORDER BY a.detailedTime DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT _abc.auditModelNumber) as result FROM ( SELECT b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.information_sources AS informationSources, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark remark FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, information_type FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE delete_status = '1' AND information_type ='审计模型来源信息'
AND "is_import" = like CONCAT('%', #{isImport}, '%')
AND dock_people = like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%')
AND dock_department like like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
) a JOIN ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, information_sources, audit_point_number, remark remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
and offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process like CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%'), '%')
and secondary_business_process like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%'), '%')
and information_sources= like CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%')
and audit_point_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%'), '%')
and audit_point_name like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%'), '%')
and audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), '%')
and audit_model_name like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%'), '%') escape '|'
) b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ) _abc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT problem_description problemDescription, audit_time auditTime, "audit_involved" auditInvolved, "audit_project" auditProject, audit_model_number, problem_summary problemSummary FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_find_database" WHERE isdel = '1' ) ba ON _abc.auditModelNumber = ba.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN ( SELECT audit_point auditPoint, "audit_prospective_point" auditProspectivePoint, "audit_system_name" auditSystemName, "audit_system_content" auditSystemContent, "audit_confirmation_findings" auditConfirmationFindings, "audit_model_name_send" auditModelNameSend, "audit_model_logic" auditModelLogic, audit_model_number FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_handover_model" WHERE isdel = '1' ) mo ON ba.audit_model_number = mo.audit_model_number

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT _abc.auditPointNumber AS auditPointNumber, _abc.auditPointName AS auditPointName, _abc.auditModelNumber AS auditModelNumber, _abc.auditModelName AS auditModelName, _abc.dockPeople AS dockPeople, _abc.dockDepartment AS dockDepartment, _abc.primaryBusinessProcess AS primaryBusinessProcess, _abc.secondaryBusinessProcess AS secondaryBusinessProcess, _abc.informationSources AS informationSources, _abc.isOnline AS isOnline, _abc.remark AS remark, _abc.typeOfInformation, _abc.detailedTime, _abc.writeTime, cc."name" shareUnit, bb."ModelName" as secondModelNumber FROM ( SELECT b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.information_sources AS informationSources, b.is_online AS isOnline, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark remark, a.type_of_information as typeOfInformation, a.detailed_time detailedTime, a.write_time as writeTime, b.share_unit share_unit, b.second_model_number FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, information_type, type_of_information, detailed_time, write_time FROM audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE delete_status = '1' AND information_type ='审计模型来源信息'
AND "is_import" = like CONCAT('%', #{isImport}, '%')
AND dock_people = like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%')
AND dock_department LIKE like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
) a JOIN ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, information_sources, audit_point_number, remark remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, is_online, share_unit, second_model_number FROM "audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
and offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process like '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%') || '%'
and secondary_business_process like '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%') || '%'
and information_sources= like CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%')
and audit_point_number like '%'||#{}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%'),like '%'||#{}, '%')
and audit_point_name like '%'||#{}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%'),like '%'||#{}, '%')
and audit_model_number like '%'||#{}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'),like '%'||#{}, '%')
and audit_model_name like '%'||#{}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%'),like '%'||#{}, '%')
and information_sources= like CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%')
) b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ORDER BY detailedTime DESC ) _abc LEFT JOIN "xbpj_company_model" bb ON _abc.second_model_number = bb."ModelNo" LEFT JOIN ( (SELECT DISTINCT (busiUnitCode, orgCode) AS id, (provinceName, '-', orgName) AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" = 'CM000') UNION ALL (SELECT DISTINCT "busiUnitCode" AS id, "provinceName" AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" != 'CM000' ORDER BY "busiUnitCode") ) cc ON _abc.share_unit = cc."id" ) a ORDER BY a.detailedTime DESC
mapper.insert:
insert into audit_elements_handover_model( id, audit_point, audit_prospective_point,audit_system_name, audit_system_content,audit_confirmation_findings, audit_model_name_send,audit_model_logic, audit_model_number, create_person,create_time,update_person,update_time,isdel) values
( like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.id}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.auditPoint}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.auditProspectivePoint}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.auditSystemName}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.auditSystemContent}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.auditConfirmationFindings}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.auditModelNameSend}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.auditModelLogic}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.auditModelNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.createPerson}, '%'), NOW(), like CONCAT('%', #{auditHandoverModel.updatePerson}, '%'), NOW(), 1)
mapper.select: (SELECT DISTINCT (busiUnitCode, orgCode) AS id, (provinceName, '-', orgName) AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" = 'CM000' ) UNION ALL (SELECT DISTINCT "busiUnitCode" AS id, "provinceName" AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" != 'CM000' ORDER BY "busiUnitCode")

SELECT aa.ModelNo AS id, aa.ModelName AS "name" FROM "xbpj_company_model" aa WHERE aa."modeling_dept" = like CONCAT('%', #{prvdId}, '%')
AND AA."org_code" = like CONCAT('%', #{orgCode}, '%')
AND AA."ModelNo" = like CONCAT('%', #{secondModelNumber}, '%')
AND AA."ModelName" = like CONCAT('%', #{secondModelName}, '%')
ORDER BY aa."model_online_time" DESC,id
